description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on push to master and test-runner-ci branches, and on pull requests to master. The workflow consists of three jobs: compilers, linux, and macos. The compilers job runs on ubuntu-22.04 with a matrix of different C and C++ compilers, installs dependencies, and runs a build script. The linux job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-22.04 and ubuntu-24.04, installs dependencies, and runs a build script. The macos job runs on macos-14, installs dependencies with Homebrew, and runs a build script with CMake and Ninja.
